title: VOICE NOTES for updates - MAJOR time saver for all of us!
excerpt:
You know how it’s often a billion times easier to SAY what you mean rather TYPE what you mean? . . . Like on Whatsapp when a voice-note to a friend gives much more insight than a written/dictated message. 
I suggest addi…

posts.author: MondayAdvocate (Craig)
posts.cookedHtml:
You know how it’s often a billion times easier to SAY what you mean rather TYPE what you mean? . . . Like on Whatsapp when a voice-note to a friend gives much more insight than a written/dictated message.

I suggest adding a ‘click and record’ voice-note option in the updates box. We all know how much easier it can be to send/receive voice notes.

**Saves times - Improves communication **

posts.author: asktiedavis (Tieshena Davis)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree, this would be VERY helpful. I love the voice note feature on the mobile app, but majority of the time I’m working from the PC. Please add this feature!

posts.author: techthings (Mischa)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be a very useful feature!

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
you can try

monday.com

voicenotes - monday.com Marketplace

Attach voice memos to your monday.com items with voicenotes.
